title: The Purple Pack
body:
![The Purple Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41c21a9fda4c669eee2653252d8ba79c6b596f32.png)

## Lovely Purple Colors!

### **This pack will require Optifine or CTM+CEM!**

I will only update textures from 1.21.4 and no more than that, in my opinion 1.21.5 wasn't a good update.
  Textures are all made by me and myself only.


```Things you might like about this Resource Pack:```

- Greener Grass/Plants.
- Purple Colors.
- (Cross) Bow Timer. (Example: is Holding down right click will turn red to green, red meaning it is not ready to shoot and green meaning it is strong enough to shoot further and do more damage.)
- Purple Golden Apples turn Gold Hearts Purple.
- White Chocolate Sugar Cookies.
- Amethyst Netherite (Netherite Trims are even Amethyst!)
- Purple Diamonds (Diamond Trims are even Purple!)
- Purple Elytras.
- Purple Cherry Wood.
- 25% Transparent Water
- Purple Cake (Jelly inside!)
- Better Purple Beds
- Furry totem
- Shorter Iron Golems
- Silly faced snowman
- What Spyglass
- Cake Hunger bars
- Cute Duckies
- Better (Husk/Villager) Zombies
- Purple sky (+Moon)
- Purple Redstone
- Better Stone
- Better Ores (Glow)
- Purple Creepers!
- Silly ":3" Ghasts
  

## Thank you for those who Downloaded this Pack, I appreciate the support!
